microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end delivery of Azure's **recovery validation platform**, standardizing workflows across 45+ annual resilience drills and driving **$14M+ customer impact** across Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp deployments.

Led 0→1 build of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and unblocked engineering teams from manual execution bottlenecks.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program in 4 months, achieving a **94% recovery rate** and surfacing critical hardware defects — establishing a new root-cause validation model for continuous resilience testing.

Served as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, directing 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility and zero customer-impacting incidents.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill throughput capacity by 21% — directly scaling team leverage without adding headcount.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation tooling by running hands-on demos and training across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and unblocking developer workflows.

Diagnosed critical **feature gaps** through 11+ structured customer interviews with Azure engineering teams, translating root-cause findings into a roadmap item for intent-based YAML generation that shipped the following quarter.

Improved **data retrieval accuracy** by migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search system with enforced metadata standards, cutting average lookup time by 83% for internal developer users.
microsoft_2022: Secured cross-functional alignment across 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, **accelerating region launches by 28%** and generating $3M in revenue impact through faster time-to-production.

Conducted discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual toil** per region launch, then built a targeted roadmap to automate critical paths and eliminate recurring operational bottlenecks.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking automation gaps across 140+ teams, giving leadership a metrics-driven view to prioritize high-impact support and validate progress against OKRs.
amazon_robotics: Defined the legacy OS migration strategy for a **2,000+ unit pilot**, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — a root-cause-first approach that prevented downstream production incidents.

Resolved **40+ high-priority tickets** by facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the developer intake queue and unblocking cross-functional engineering teams from repeated support escalations.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to deploy **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual release toil for embedded robotics teams.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by redesigning the end-to-end CRM workflow for 200+ monthly proposals, standardizing the scoping and invoicing lifecycle to reduce ticket resolution time and improve customer success rates.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion rates 2.7% by executing a data-driven go-to-market strategy with website and Google profile optimizations tied to measurable funnel metrics.

Conducted profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records** to identify margin leaks and deliver pricing model improvements — a root-cause diagnosis that directly informed leadership's operational strategy.
